_schema_notes.coverage: Authoritative schema for all DID formats — DD Form 1664 (pre-2014) and free-text (post-2014 MIL-STD-963C)
_schema_notes.did_format: Set to 'dd_form_1664' or 'free_text'. Determines which fields are expected to be populated.
_schema_notes.963c_compliant: True if the DID was prepared under MIL-STD-963C (2014 or later). False for older DIDs.
_schema_notes.reserved_fields: Fields marked RESERVED are present in one format but not the other. Always include them — set to empty string or empty array when not applicable.
_schema_notes.preparation_instructions: Official MIL-STD-963C name for what was previously called 'requirements'. Contains the numbered sections of the DID. All section numbers are normalized to strictly numeric dot-notation (1, 1.1, 1.1.1). Letter-based source numbering (2.a, 3.1.b) is converted to numeric equivalents (2.1, 3.1.2).
_schema_notes.asterisk: True if the requirement number is followed by * in the source document (conditional requirement).

title: Detail Specification Documents
summary: This DID specifies design requirements for items in multiple programs, covering materials, achievement methods, fabrication, and construction, and provides content and format instructions for detail specifications.
use_relationship: A detail specification will be used to specify design requirements for items used in multiple programs or applications, in terms of materials to be used, how a requirement is to be achieved or how an item is to be fabricated or constructed. Detail specification documents are intended for reference in acquisition contracts.
distribution_statement: DISTRIBUTION STATEMENT A: Approved for public release; distribution is unlimited.

preparation_instructions.title: Reference documents.
preparation_instructions.content: The applicable issue of the documents cited herein, including their approval dates and dates of any applicable amendments, notices, and revisions, shall be as specified in the contract.

preparation_instructions.title: Format and content.
preparation_instructions.content: Format and content for detail specification documents shall be as follows:

children.title: Detail Specification.
children.content: Format and content of detail specification shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-961, paragraphs 4.1 through 5.14.

children.title: Detail Specification Sheet.
children.content: Format and content of detail specification sheets shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-961, paragraphs 5.16 through 5.16.4.

children.title: Detail Specification Revision.
children.content: Format and content of detail specification revisions shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-961, paragraphs 5.17 through 5.17.2.

children.title: Detail Specification Supplement.
children.content: Format and content of detail specification supplements shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-961, paragraphs 5.15 through 5.15.9.

children.title: Detail Specification Amendment.
children.content: Format and content of detail specification amendments shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-961, paragraphs 5.18 through 5.18.7.

children.title: Detail Specification Inactive for New Design Notice.
children.content: Format and content of inactive for new design notices shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-961, paragraph 5.19.2.

children.title: Detail Specification Cancellation Notice.
children.content: Format and content of cancellation notices shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-961, paragraph 5.19.3.

children.title: Detail Specification Reinstatement Notice.
children.content: Format and content of reinstatement notices shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-961, paragraph 5.19.4.

children.title: Detail Specification Reactivation Notice.
children.content: Format and content of reactivation notices shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-961, paragraph 5.19.5.

children.title: Detail Specification Administrative Notice.
children.content: Format and content of administrative notices shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-961, paragraph 5.19.6.
